zh.lifeSummary: 當William Alington III於1390年出生在英國坎布利其爾波迪夏馬時，他的父親William Alington25歲，母親Joane de Burgh20歲。他於大約1426年與Elizabeth Argentyne在英國坎布利其爾波迪夏馬結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1446年10月19日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾波迪夏馬享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Alington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Allington
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from any of at least nine different places called Allington, two in Kent, three in Wiltshire, and one each in Dorset, Devon, Hampshire, and Lincolnshire. These have different origins: those in Devon, Wiltshire near Chippenham, and Kent near Maidstone are from the Old English personal name Ælla + -ingtūn meaning ‘Ælla's farm’; those in Dorset, Wiltshire near Devizes, and Lincolnshire are named with Old English ætheling ‘prince' + tūn, meaning ‘settlement of the prince’; those in Hampshire and Wiltshire near Amesbury are from the Old English personal name Ealda + tūn; and the one in Kent near Lenham is from the Old English personal name Æthelnōth + -ingtūn, meaning ‘Æthelnōth's farm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Alington III was born in 1390, in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, William Alington, was 25 and his mother, Joane de Burgh, was 20. He married Elizabeth Argentyne about 1426, in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 19 October 1446, in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

ko.lifeSummary: William Alington III(이)가 1390년 영국 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Alington(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane de Burgh(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1426년 영국 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에서 Elizabeth Argentyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1446년 10월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Alington III родился в 1390 г. в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Alington было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Burgh, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Argentyne около 1426 г. в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 октября 1446 г. в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
